brand_rules.colors: Dark emerald green (#0f1a0f), deep black, rich gold (#c9a227)
brand_rules.lighting: Directional gold light from above, warm, dramatic
brand_rules.no_text_rule: NEVER generate text, words, letters, logos, price tags, or numbers inside any image or video
brand_rules.mobile_rule: Every image must read clearly on a 6-inch phone screen

character_appearances.LADY_E: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, floor-length dark emerald green gown with gold trim, long black gloves, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture
character_appearances.LADY_E_WORLD_CUP: Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain around her neck, large gold hoop earrings, gold bracelet, gold crown-style headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture
character_appearances.LUCKY_LOU: Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers and gold star stickers, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, always holding or near a 4-leaf clover
character_appearances.LUCKY_LOU_WORLD_CUP: Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wide expressive eyes, large warm smile, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine emoji stickers plus a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible above loafers, always holding or near a 4-leaf clover
character_appearances.GOLDEN_DEALER: Tall male character, all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, gold-edged card deck in hand, wide-brim hat with face partially shadowed showing only jaw and lips, completely still, commanding presence
character_appearances.SUMMER_CREW: Group of 4-5 diverse players, mix of male and female, varied ages (25-50), varied ethnicities, all in smart-casual celebration attire in dark and gold tones

assets.prompt: 15-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: Opening wide shot of a luxury casino floor styled as a grand golden stadium — emerald green carpet, arched gold lights overhead, card tables lit from within. A soccer ball rolls slowly across the foreground into frame. Movement: camera slowly pushes forward as the ball reaches center floor and begins to transform — the ball seamlessly morphs into a spinning gold casino chip in slow motion, golden sparks trailing as it spins. Character action: Black female character mid-30s to early 40s wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, gold crown headpiece, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick — she walks into frame from the left, stops at the spinning chip, looks down at it, then looks up directly at the camera with a slow, powerful, confident smile. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, dramatic stadium-style floodlights. Atmosphere: golden particle dust floating in air, deep emerald shadows, premium casino-stadium hybrid energy. Audio cue: distant stadium crowd roar that fades to casino ambient. Style: photorealistic cinematic. Color: dark emerald green, deep black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters in the video. Camera: starts wide, slow push to medium shot on character.

Wide cinematic shot of a luxury casino floor styled as a grand stadium interior — emerald green carpet stretching to a vanishing point, rows of gold-lit card tables on each side, overhead gold arch lights creating cathedral-like depth. Tall male character in all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat with face half-shadowed showing only jaw and a slight smirk — standing motionless at the far end of the floor, a single gold casino coin balanced perfectly on his fingertip, arm slightly extended. Foreground: close-up shallow-focus detail of scattered gold coins on emerald velvet. Background: the full length of the casino-stadium floor with ambient stadium lighting softly diffused. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above creating long dramatic shadows, deep emerald fills. Mood: powerful, mysterious, the calm before the storm. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury casino aesthetic. Color: dark emerald green (#0f1a0f), deep black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: low wide angle, slight upward tilt toward the dealer at the far end.

Vertical cinematic portrait. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no real team logos, fishing hat covered in slot machine stickers and a small soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks (one green one gold) visible, holding a 4-leaf clover — standing at the opening of a stadium tunnel that glows intense gold at the far end. He faces the camera with a wide, almost overwhelmed grin, fist raised in excitement and anticipation. Foreground: slightly wet concrete tunnel floor reflecting the golden glow. Background: the glowing gold circle of the tunnel exit, with faint Lady E Luck crown logo shape in the glow (no text, just the visual crown shape). Lighting: warm gold backlight flooding from the tunnel exit, cool emerald shadows from tunnel walls. Mood: electric, joyful, about to enter the arena. Style: photorealistic, cinematic. Color: dark emerald green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium shot, slightly below eye level, slight upward tilt.

Wide cinematic shot. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped fitted referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain around her neck, gold crown headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick, tall confident posture — she stands at the threshold of a grand emerald entrance arch, arms open in a welcoming gesture, warm and powerful smile. Behind her: a sweeping casino hall stretching back like a luxury stadium concourse, emerald and gold columns on each side, warm gold ambient lighting overhead. Foreground: scattered gold coins on dark emerald marble floor, leading the eye toward her. Background: deep perspective of the casino interior with soft gold bokeh lights. Lighting: warm directional gold light from above, slightly brighter on her face, dramatic. Mood: inviting, welcoming, prestigious. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury casino aesthetic. Color: dark emerald green, deep black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium wide shot at eye level, slight golden vignette.

Vertical close-up portrait. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain, gold crown headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick — she looks directly into the camera with a soft, warm, confident, slightly knowing smile. One hand lightly resting near her gold whistle. Background: shallow-focus emerald stadium lights creating soft bokeh circles of green and gold. Lighting: soft warm gold key light from slightly above, gentle emerald rim light, creating a beautiful cinematic portrait quality. Mood: personal, warm, premium, 'you belong here.' Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury. Color: dark emerald green, deep black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: close-up portrait, slight shallow depth of field, straight-on eye level.

Vertical cinematic shot. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, wearing green-and-gold soccer jersey with no team logos, fishing hat with slot stickers and soccer ball sticker, mismatched lucky socks, holding a 4-leaf clover — he bursts out of a green locker room door into blinding golden light, arms spread wide, clover held high, massive open-mouth grin of pure joy. Body language: full momentum, like he just got called to the game. Background: the locker room door is emerald green with gold hardware, the hallway beyond glows gold. Foreground: slight motion blur on his movement suggesting energy and speed. Lighting: bright warm gold light flooding the frame from in front of him, dramatic contrast with the dark locker room behind. Mood: pure comeback energy — joyful, irresistible, magnetic. Style: photorealistic, cinematic. Color: dark emerald green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium shot, slightly below eye level looking up, wide.

Cinematic wide product-style shot. Three large gold casino chips stacked in a perfect pyramid on a soccer penalty spot painted on dark emerald green turf. Each chip is engraved with a crown design (visual, not text). Behind the chips: a full-size goal net in the background with golden coins cascading down through the net like rain, coins catching the light and glinting. Stadium floodlights from above shine down like spotlights on the chips — single dramatic beam of gold light. Foreground: the turf texture is sharp and clear, early morning dew visible. Background: goal net in soft focus, the cascading coins creating a golden waterfall effect. Lighting: hard directional stadium floodlight from directly above, creating strong shadows on the turf, chips gleam. Mood: powerful, exclusive, this is the deal of the day. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury sports meets casino. Color: dark emerald green, black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: medium wide, low angle looking up slightly at the chip pyramid.

Cinematic action freeze-frame. Male character, mid-30s, stocky-average build, green-and-gold soccer jersey (no team logo), fishing hat with stickers, mismatched socks, 4-leaf clover tucked in jersey collar — he is captured in a perfect mid-kick pose, leg fully extended, boot making contact with a soccer ball. The soccer ball trails golden sparks and is visibly transforming mid-air: the left half is still a soccer ball, the right half has already become a gold casino chip — a seamless metamorphosis caught in freeze-frame. Foreground: a single 4-leaf clover on the turf near his planted foot. Background: blurred roaring stadium crowd, emerald and gold ambient light, the sense of 50,000 people watching. Lighting: warm gold overhead stadium floodlight, motion blur on the ball/chip transition, golden particle trail. Mood: joyful action, community, pass it forward. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, sports action with casino luxury aesthetic. Color: dark emerald green, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium shot from side angle, slightly low, motion-freeze composition.

Vertical cinematic overhead shot. Three gold casino chips arranged in a perfect equilateral triangle on dark emerald green velvet fabric. Each chip glows from within with warm gold light, as if containing energy. The velvet fabric catches and scatters the gold light in subtle iridescent patterns. Background: at the very edges of the frame, extremely soft-focus blurred shapes of a stadium crowd silhouette in emerald and black tones, giving a sense of stadium scale without taking focus. Lighting: dramatic single overhead downlight creates a pool of warm gold on the chips and velvet, with deep shadow at the frame edges — the chips are the center of the universe in this shot. Mood: luxurious, exclusive, this is the deal. Style: photorealistic, cinematic overhead product shot. Color: deep emerald green, black velvet, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: directly overhead (top-down flat lay), tight on the triangle composition.

10-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: The Golden Dealer walks slowly in from the left edge of frame across a luxury casino floor — all-black slim-cut suit, gold pocket square, wide-brim hat casting half his face in shadow, completely deliberate movement, no rush. Movement: slow lateral camera track follows him from the side. Character action: He reaches a gold card table at center frame, stops. With a single smooth motion, he opens his jacket and removes a small glowing golden boot trophy — polished, gleaming, impossibly perfect. He sets it on the table with a soft 'click' (implied by the precision of his movement). He slowly raises his shadowed face toward the camera — only his jaw and chin visible under the hat — and his lips barely move as he says one sentence (no audio required — the visual tells it all). Lighting: single dramatic gold spotlight from directly above illuminating only the table and the boot, everything else in deep shadow. Atmosphere: distant murmur of casino-stadium ambient. Style: photorealistic cinematic, ultra-premium. Color: deep black, dark emerald, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: side profile medium shot walking → holds as he places the trophy → slow push in toward the trophy.

Vertical cinematic close-overhead shot. A large bonus wheel glowing in emerald green and gold fills most of the vertical frame — each segment alternates dark emerald and deep black with gold dividers, and each segment contains a glowing emblem (crown shapes, star shapes, clover shapes — all visual, no text or numbers). The wheel is caught mid-spin, creating dramatic golden motion-blur trails flowing outward from the center like golden light streaks. At the very center of the wheel: a single large glowing 4-leaf clover in gold. At the bottom left of frame: a recognizable male hand — mid-30s, wearing one green and one gold sock visible at the wrist (hinting at Lucky Lou) — reaching into frame to give the wheel one final spin push. Foreground: the wheel surface, sharp and detailed in the center where Lucky Lou's hand touches. Background: dark casino floor in deep shadow. Lighting: the wheel itself emits warm gold and emerald light, creating colorful ambient glow on surrounding darkness. Mood: exciting, urgent, don't miss out. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury. Color: dark emerald, black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters, no numbers on the wheel. Camera: overhead looking down, slight angle.

Vertical cinematic portrait. Black female character, mid-30s to early 40s, wearing black and gold striped referee-inspired dress with gold whistle on a chain around her neck, gold crown headpiece in natural dark hair, deep bronze-brown skin, crimson red lipstick — she leans slightly forward toward the camera, pointing one gloved finger directly at the lens (at the viewer), confident and direct, slight intensity in her expression — not aggressive, powerful. Behind her: a large pulsing golden countdown glow (abstract light, not numbers) radiates from the background, filling the frame with urgent warm gold energy. Foreground: very slight gold particle dust floating between her and the camera. Lighting: key gold light from slightly above front, strong enough to be cinematic but not harsh — she looks stunning. Mood: direct, personal, this is for you — claim it before midnight. Style: photorealistic, cinematic. Color: dark emerald, black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: medium-close portrait, straight-on, eye level.

Wide cinematic group shot. A joyful group of 5 diverse people — mixed genders, ages 25-50, various ethnicities, wearing smart-casual attire in black, emerald, and gold tones — celebrating together in a luxurious casino lounge. In the background, large widescreen panels show a glowing gold soccer pitch (no real team identifiers). Lucky Lou is in the center of the group — male, mid-30s, stocky build, green-and-gold soccer jersey (no team logo), fishing hat with stickers, enormous beaming smile, 4-leaf clover raised triumphantly in one hand above his head. Everyone is laughing, cheering, raising crystal glasses (liquid only, no labels). Gold confetti rains down throughout the frame. The lighting catches the confetti creating sparkle throughout. Foreground: a few gold confetti pieces close to camera lens, slightly out of focus. Background: the luxury lounge with deep emerald and gold ambient lighting, the World Cup pitch screens behind. Lighting: warm gold ceiling light flooding the scene, premium lounge warmth. Mood: pure community joy — everyone wins here. Style: photorealistic, cinematic. Color: dark emerald, black, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters in the image. Camera: wide group shot, eye level, everyone fits in frame with space above for confetti.

Vertical wide-angle cinematic shot of a luxury casino lounge interior. Multiple people seated in premium chairs and booth seating — their backs partially to camera, facing large widescreen panels that display a glowing gold soccer pitch (no real team logos or text). The screens cast a warm gold and green ambient light across the whole room, mixing beautifully with the casino's existing gold lighting. Rich dark emerald booth seating, gold trim details on tables and columns, pendant gold lights overhead. People lean in, engaged and excited, drinks on tables, casual luxury energy. Foreground: close-up detail of a gold table edge with two crystal glasses, slightly out of focus. Background: the screens glow and the crowd watches, stadium energy contained in a premium space. Lighting: mixed — screen glow (warm gold/green), overhead pendant gold lights, deep emerald shadows in corners. Mood: premium, intimate, communal celebration — this is where you want to be tonight. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, luxury interior. Color: dark emerald, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: wide establishing shot from the side, vertical framing, moderate depth of field.

Vertical cinematic close-up product shot. A richly embossed golden envelope rests on dark green velvet in the center of the frame. The envelope is thick, sealed with a gold wax crown emblem (visual crown shape, no text). The envelope glows from within — warm light leaks from all its edges as if something extraordinary is inside, pulsing gently. One corner of the envelope is slightly raised as if being lifted by an unseen hand. Background: midnight darkness with a single soft stadium spotlight filtering down from far above, creating a clean cone of light around only the envelope, everything else in near-total black. Atmosphere: a few floating gold dust particles drift through the light cone. Foreground: the velvet fabric has a subtle shimmer. Lighting: interior envelope glow (warm amber-gold), single overhead spotlight (cool white to gold at center), pure black surrounding. Mood: mystery, exclusivity, this is for the chosen. Style: photorealistic, cinematic, ultra-luxury. Color: black, dark emerald, rich gold. No text, no words, no letters, no numbers. Camera: slightly above, looking down at a slight angle, tight on the envelope.

12-second vertical cinematic video clip. Shot: Lucky Lou (male, mid-30s, stocky-average build, green-and-gold soccer jersey with no team logo, fishing hat with stickers, mismatched lucky socks) sits in a luxury casino lounge chair watching a screen off-camera, leaning forward, gripping his 4-leaf clover tightly, tense with anticipation. Movement: first 4 seconds — slow push in on his face, showing every micro-expression of suspense. Then: a sound like a whistle blast (implied by his reaction). Character action: He ERUPTS — leaps to his feet, fishing hat flies sideways off his head, clover launched into the air, fists punching up, mouth open in pure screaming joy. Gold confetti explosively appears in the frame from above. He looks straight at the camera, points at it, huge grin, as if to say 'WE WON.' Final 4 seconds: instant slow-motion replay of the exact fist-pump moment — golden particles slowed down, confetti in slow float, pure cinematic victory. Lighting: first half — moody casino lounge golds; explosion moment — burst of warm gold light floods the frame. Atmosphere: throughout, warm casino gold ambient; on celebration, gold particle burst + confetti. Style: photorealistic cinematic, emotional, high-energy. Color: dark emerald, black, gold. No text, no words, no letters. Camera: starts medium on his face → holds as he erupts → wide to capture full celebration → slow-mo medium close-up replay.

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Music mode: full original song. Title: Golden Kick. Genre: Afrobeats/Trap Fusion. BPM: 105. Key: D minor. Mood: stadium anthem — triumphant, electric, celebratory. Instruments: stadium crowd roar intro, Afrobeats percussion (talking drum + shaker), 808 bass, brass horn section, hand drums, synth shimmer stabs, coin-drop sound effects woven through. Lyrics: INTRO: 'Ohhhh ohhhh ohhhh... Lady E Luck, tonight we rise / The pitch is golden, gold is the prize' — VERSE 1: 'Friday night, the stadium glows / Everybody here, everybody knows / Dark green and gold, that's our colors right / We don't just play — we WIN tonight / Boot on the ball, spin on the wheel / Every moment here is real / Lucky Lou said Watch me go / Golden Dealer said Put it on the show' — PRE-CHORUS: 'Match day, pay day, Lady E say / Score your bonus don't delay / The whistle blows at midnight sharp / But right now we party from the heart' — CHORUS: 'Golden Kick, golden spin / Lady E Luck, let the games begin / Score big, win big, tonight's the night / Golden boot shining, golden light / Golden Kick — aye aye aye / Golden Spin — aye aye aye / We don't lose, we don't lose / Lady E Luck — Golden Kick!' — VERSE 2: 'Argentina in Miami 6 o'clock / We watching every second we can't stop / Three recharges equal Hat Trick win / Pass your code let your people in / Halftime Reload at the midnight hour / Mystery drop feel the power / The Golden Dealer tips his hat / You already know what's after that' — BRIDGE: 'Ohhhh — tonight we celebrate / 250 years and the World Cup great / USA soil Lady E floor / Golden Friday we want MORE — crowd chant: More More More / Lucky Lou says he always wins / And tonight it begins again' — FINAL CHORUS: repeat chorus — OUTRO: 'Lady E Luck... Golden Kickoff... / World Cup Friday... we don't stop... / Ohhhh ohhhh ohhhh... / See you at the Golden Hour.' Emotion: triumphant, joyful, communal, premium. Pacing: builds from moderate Afrobeats groove to stadium anthem peak at chorus. Notes: Lady E leads vocals throughout; crowd chant background voices on bridge; coin-drop sound woven through outro.

Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'The game is already in play... and your bonus is already waiting. Welcome to Lady E Luck. This is where winners come home.' Emotion: warm, commanding, welcoming — like a host who knows you belong there. Pacing: slow and deliberate, with slight pause after 'in play' and before 'Welcome.' Notes: slight ambient casino background suggested. Cinematic, premium delivery.

Voice: Lucky Lou. Preset: Leo. Voice ID: 73a45c18-0c56-4642-a61e-f6b303f8ded1. Text: 'I KNEW it! I always said — Lucky Lou ALWAYS wins! Tonight was OUR night. World Cup Friday. Lady E Luck. We never lose!' Emotion: explosive joy, disbelief turning to triumph, lovable and infectious. Pacing: starts mid-shout, breathless, slightly stumbling over words from excitement. Notes: sounds like a real spontaneous reaction — imperfect, human, electric.

Voice: Golden Dealer. Preset: Sterling. Voice ID: dc382508-c8bd-443c-8cb2-46e57b8d2e6f. Text: 'The boot belongs to the biggest.' Emotion: completely calm, almost quiet, deeply certain — no drama needed when you have this much authority. Pacing: extremely deliberate, each word a full beat. Long pause before the line. Notes: minimal ambient sound. This line should feel like the most important thing said all day. Deep, resonant, unforgettable.

assets.post_time: 10:00 PM — paired with post 12 mystery story
assets.prompt: Voice: Lady E. Preset: Vesper. Voice ID: c3204739-4084-41a3-9dc5-c805b307ec18. Text: 'The second half... always surprises. Tonight's mystery drop is live. Active players know what to do. The Golden Hour has begun.' Emotion: mysterious, knowing, warm power — like a secret only she and the audience share. Pacing: slow, deliberate, slight pause after 'surprises' and after 'live.' Notes: slight reverb/echo treatment suggested, as if speaking in a grand empty space.
